prompt: Static-exported Next frontend served by Frappe at /portal: saves fail with CSRF error only in production. Diagnose and fix.
assertions: Identifies missing window.csrf_token in the served HTML as the root cause
Explains the Jinja injection of frappe.session.csrf_token via www rendering
Explains why dev worked (ignore_csrf / session config, not the proxy itself)
Warns against using ignore_csrf in production as the fix
